name: Thor - God of Thunder
short_description: THOR – GOD OF THUNDER is a third-person beat-’em-up where you battle across realms, climb the frozen mountain, and defeat the Frost King. Unlock new armor and storm powers like Thunder Wave and Loki’s Illusion. Crush Frost Giants, transform into a Titan, and fight to a reactive rock soundtrack. ⚡
detailed_description:
⚡ THOR – GOD OF THUNDER ⚡

Fight your way across multiple realms as you climb the frozen mountain to confront and defeat the Frost King.

Every battle brings you closer to the summit — and stronger than before.

Unlock powerful new armor sets and devastating abilities including:

⚡ Thunder Wave
⚡ Thunder Bolt
🌀 Loki’s Illusion
…and more storm-forged powers.

Face diverse enemy types — from undead warriors and Hel creatures to towering Frost Giants. When the fury builds, transform into a massive Titan form and crush everything in your path.

Combat is fast, heavy, and brutal — a third-person beat-’em-up driven by thunderous rock music that fuels every strike.

The soundtrack reacts to how you fight.
The harder you battle, the more intense the music becomes.

You don’t just hear the storm.
You control it.

Join the battle.
Rise through the realms.
Become a god. ⚡
